contract: launch checklist, deploy target, post-launch verification

artifact.summary: Phase 7 LAUNCH is sealed launch-READY with the production publish owner-owned. The v3 parity build is real and healthy: independent `npx factory build` exit 0 (38 routes, sitemap-index.xml emitted) and `npx factory validate` exit 0. A full dist sweep is clean across every launch invariant. The three blockers on the superseded Jul-10 draft are resolved with evidence (see supersedes): (1) the packet/capsule 'hash mismatch' was a raw-file-sha error; the canonical delegation-stripped stableHash of the packet is 2dda44042b29a02a2101252b0961101b9645bf451b28ba4db0a86acb54cc7e39 and the capsule is b3011c498e72828d9703591e703cb35c9b5a2dcd59898a01a2434e2cda2aa9a0, both re-computed here and matching the declared values exactly; (2) deploy is owner-authorized and owner-run; (3) the '208 reviews' concern does not reproduce. A 2026-07-15 read-only live check found the production origin already serving content BYTE-IDENTICAL to this verified v3 build across nine sampled routes (diff = 0 lines, identical content-hashed _astro bundles), count-free (0 '208 reviews'), showing '4.4 stars on Google' - consistent with sealed Phase 5's live audit and contradicting the stale draft's transient '208 reviews live' observation. Two human-owned gates remain: the owner's production deploy/confirmation and the Yahya launch-readiness approval.
checklist: read-phase3-launch-identity: done - read packet.inputEvidence.phase3.identityDecision (mode real; domain https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app; email captainsfishchicken@gmail.com; GA4 G-7W35DKNK6Z; paymentAccepted unknown). No declared fixtures shipped; dist fixture scan = 0 leaks.

read-phase5-validation-results: done - read packet.inputEvidence.phase5 (factory validate exit 0, 11/11 validators, 0 blocking, 6 acknowledged advisories, 0 open failures) and re-ran `npx factory validate` -> exit 0 independently.

read-phase6-imagery-proof: done - read packet.inputEvidence.phase6 verificationReport/exports/selections (status pass, 94/94 asset refs resolve, webp heroes, representational-honesty note) and re-verified via dist sweep (152 , 0 missing alt, 0 broken image refs).
read-specialist-skill: done - read local-launch-checklist SKILL.md at the packet specialistSkillPath before authoring; used its 9 required launchChecklist ids.
fill-phase-artifact: done - launchChecklist (all 9 required ids, passing status + evidence), deployTarget, and postLaunchVerification filled with concrete live/dist evidence.
inspect-before-complete: done - `inspect-artifact` run against this artifact and iterated to ok:true, problems:[] before returning.
review-notes-file: acknowledged - the launch-readiness reviewer gate that follows must travel by --notes-file; that gate is parent-run and not executed by this builder (see gatesAfterCompletion).

supersedes.supersededArtifactStatus: blocked (Jul-10 draft at this same path)

resolvedBlockers.resolution: The stale draft compared the raw on-disk file sha256; the runner certifies the CANONICAL delegation-stripped stableHash = sha256(JSON.stringify(packet-without-delegation) + '\n'). Recomputed here: packet canonical = 2dda44042b29a02a2101252b0961101b9645bf451b28ba4db0a86acb54cc7e39 (matches capsule.packetHash and packet.delegation.packetHash); capsule stableHash = b3011c498e72828d9703591e703cb35c9b5a2dcd59898a01a2434e2cda2aa9a0 (matches packet.delegation.capsuleHash). Both MATCH declared values. Integrity holds.

resolvedBlockers.blocker: DEPLOY AUTHORIZATION (relayed directive was not owner consent)
resolvedBlockers.resolution: Deploy is now owner-authorized and owner-run: the site owner has elected to run `netlify deploy --prod --dir=dist` themselves (Netlify site b3578dcc-c6b6-4070-b049-55e35dfb1c09, CLI-linked). This builder performs no production deploy; deployTarget.method = owner-run.

resolvedBlockers.blocker: LIVE-VS-SEALED CONTRADICTION ('208 reviews' live vs count-free dist)
resolvedBlockers.resolution: Does not reproduce. 2026-07-15 read-only live check: live origin is byte-identical to the verified count-free v3 build across nine sampled routes (0 '208 reviews', shows '4.4 stars on Google'), matching sealed Phase 5's live audit. The stale draft's '208 reviews live' was a transient/erroneous observation; dist HTML contains 0 '208 reviews' (the only 'bare 208' hits are binary bytes inside menu JPEGs and logo.png, not review counts).

buildEvidence.note: factory validate prints no output on success; exit code 0 is the pass signal. Consistent with sealed Phase 5 (11/11 validators, 6 blocking gates pass).

liveReadOnlyCheck.mode: read-only HTTP GET only; no writes to production
liveReadOnlyCheck.liveReviewStat: count-free: '4.4 stars on Google'; 0 occurrences of '208 reviews' or any 'NNN reviews' string on live home
liveReadOnlyCheck.liveGa4: googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-7W35DKNK6Z loads on live home; G-7W35DKNK6Z present
liveReadOnlyCheck.conclusion: Live production origin already serves content byte-identical to this run's verified v3 build; the launch content is already reflected in production and matches the sealed, validated artifacts.

launchChecklist.evidence: identityDecision mode=real. Production URL https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app returns HTTP 200 (live). Business email captainsfishchicken@gmail.com present on /contact/. GA4 measurement id G-7W35DKNK6Z is a real (non-placeholder) id present on all 38 dist pages and loaded live via googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-7W35DKNK6Z. Dist fixture scan found 0 leaks of .example / G-XXXXXXXXXX / 555-0147 / placeholder. No fixture identity anywhere.
launchChecklist.caveat: Payment policy is unknown (owner never stated). No payment claims or paymentAccepted schema appear anywhere on the site - correctly not fabricated.

launchChecklist.evidence: Independent re-run: `npx factory build` exit 0 (38 routes) and `npx factory validate` exit 0. Sealed Phase 5 recorded 11/11 validators passing - 6 blocking gates (schema-floor, route-completeness, cro-block-presence, do-not-ship-guards, sap-anti-doorway, graph-gate) plus 5 advisories - with 0 open failures, and the seo-geo audit status ready_with_concerns (0 blocking findings, 6 advisories).
launchChecklist.nextAction: 6 acknowledged non-blocking advisories carried to owner follow-up: OG/Twitter meta absent (og-social.jpg on disk); structured openingHoursSpecification lacks Fri-Sat (hours owner-unconfirmed); 5 titles 66-69 chars may truncate; /menu/ meta description 203 chars; hours remain owner-unconfirmed with on-site 'call to confirm' caveat; dual visible phone formats (cosmetic).

launchChecklist.evidence: Sealed Phase 6 verificationReport status pass (94/94 asset refs resolve, 0 broken, 5 modern-format webp heroes, representational-honesty note present, desktop + mobile UI checks pass). Independent dist sweep confirms 152 tags with 0 missing alt (100% alt coverage) and 0 broken image references across 38 pages; live pages byte-identical to dist.
launchChecklist.caveat: public/logo.png is a raster placeholder pending an owner file drop (drop-in swap, no route impact). Representational menu renders remain available to replace with owner photography; no route impact.

launchChecklist.evidence: Click-to-call: tel: CTAs on all 38 pages (231 tel hrefs; formats tel:+1-319-221-1040 and tel:+13192211040), including the sticky mobile call bar. Directions: Google Maps directions (dir/?api=1&destination=1616+1st+Ave+NE...) and search CTAs on home and /contact/. Email captainsfishchicken@gmail.com on /contact/. All verified in dist and on the byte-identical live origin (mobile + desktop share the same static markup).
launchChecklist.acceptedException: Sealed owner call-only decision: lead form omitted site-wide and no SMS/text number exists. Documented exception, not a defect. Order-online is handled via external CTAs (DoorDash, UberEats, Grubhub), not a form.

launchChecklist.evidence: Live /robots.txt (200) carries the AI-crawler allow-list (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended), a User-agent:* Allow:/ rule, and Sitemap + Llms-txt directives - no Disallow blocking key pages. Live /sitemap-index.xml and /sitemap-0.xml return 200; sitemap-0 lists 38 on-origin URLs. Canonical tags present and self-referencing on host captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app on all 38 dist pages (0 missing, 0 off-host). All sampled live routes return 200 (no crawl errors observed).
launchChecklist.nextAction: OWNER (requires Google Search Console account): add/verify the property and submit sitemap-index.xml, then monitor GSC Coverage for crawl errors post-launch.

launchChecklist.evidence: GA4 base install verified firing live: googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-7W35DKNK6Z loads on the live home page and the id is present on all 38 pages, so page_view fires. Conversion events are wired in-code on all 38 pages: a click listener fires gtag('event','contact',{transport_type:'beacon',contact_href:...}) on click-to-call and directions CTAs.
launchChecklist.nextAction: OWNER (requires GA4 account): confirm page_view and the 'contact' event land in the GA4 property via Realtime/DebugView and mark 'contact' as a key event/conversion. Form-submit event is N/A (call-only, no form - documented exception).

launchChecklist.evidence: Single consistent NAP tuple on all 38 pages: 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402 / display (319) 221-1040 / tel +1-319-221-1040, with 0 competing phone strings. Restaurant JSON-LD on all 38 pages (plus WebSite x38, WebPage x37, BreadcrumbList x37, FAQPage x21, ContactPage x1, Menu x1) with 0 JSON-LD parse errors. llms.txt live (200).
launchChecklist.nextAction: OWNER (requires GBP/account access): claim/verify Google Business Profile; confirm NAP/hours/categories/photos parity and set the website field; sync the live rating; clean stale citations (legacy 'Pita Kabab' address on Yelp/Grubhub mirrors, Apple Maps pin); extend structured openingHoursSpecification to Fri-Sat once the owner confirms hours (on-site 'please call to confirm' caveat retained until then - no fabricated hours).

launchChecklist.evidence: Full dist internal-link sweep: 0 broken across 1201 internal hrefs. 0 broken across 152 image references. All sampled live routes (/, /menu/, /menu/desserts/, /menu/kids-meals/, /contact/, /robots.txt, /sitemap-index.xml, /sitemap-0.xml, /llms.txt) return HTTP 200 and are byte-identical to dist.
launchChecklist.nextAction: Primary external CTAs are well-formed third-party URLs (DoorDash, UberEats, Grubhub order links; Google Maps). These third-party endpoints were not independently load-tested here; recommend a periodic external-link health check post-launch.

launchChecklist.evidence: Mobile Lighthouse (v13.4.0, headless Chrome, mobile form-factor) run against the live origin. Home: Performance 89, Accessibility 96, Best Practices 100, SEO 92. /menu/: Performance 67, Accessibility 95, Best Practices 100, SEO 92. Accessibility, Best Practices, and SEO are >=90 on both pages; checks recorded for the homepage and a representative inner page.
launchChecklist.nextAction: POST-LAUNCH OPTIMIZATION ADVISORY (not a launch blocker): mobile Performance is below 90 on both pages (89 home; 67 on the image-heavy /menu/). Pursue image weight / LCP optimization on menu pages. (The inner-page run reported real scores; Chrome logged a Windows temp-dir teardown EPERM after the report was written - environment cleanup noise, not a site defect.)

deployTarget.deployedByThisPhaseReason: This launch builder does not execute production deploys; publishing to production is an owner-owned action. No deploy was performed by this phase.
deployTarget.liveOriginState: As of the 2026-07-15 read-only check, the live production origin already serves content byte-identical to this verified v3 build across all nine sampled routes (diff = 0 lines; identical content-hashed _astro bundles; count-free; '4.4 stars on Google'). The owner has elected to run/confirm the production publish themselves; running `netlify deploy --prod --dir=dist` re-publishes already-verified, byte-identical content. The launch is effectively already reflected in production.

gbp-nap: single NAP tuple (1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402 / (319) 221-1040 / +1-319-221-1040) on all 38 pages; Restaurant JSON-LD x38, 0 parse errors. On-site NAP verified; GBP-side parity is an owner follow-up.

deferredToOwnerPostDeploy: GSC: add/verify the Search Console property, submit sitemap-index.xml, and monitor crawl errors (requires owner Search Console account).
GA4 in-property confirmation: verify page_view + 'contact' events in Realtime/DebugView and mark 'contact' as a key event (requires owner GA4 account).
GBP: claim/verify Google Business Profile; confirm NAP/hours/categories/photos parity and set website field; sync live rating (requires owner GBP access).
Business hours: owner to confirm hours so structured openingHoursSpecification can extend to Fri-Sat; on-site 'call to confirm' caveat retained until then.
Logo: drop the real public/logo.png to replace the raster placeholder (drop-in, no route impact).
Stale citations: clean the legacy 'Pita Kabab' address on Yelp/Grubhub mirrors; fix the Apple Maps pin.
OG/Twitter meta: add social-preview tags (og-social.jpg already on disk) - Phase 5/6 advisory.
Mobile Performance: optimize image weight / LCP on image-heavy menu pages (mobile Performance 67 on /menu/).
truthfulnessCaveats: Logo is a placeholder pending an owner file drop.
Business hours are owner-unconfirmed; on-site copy retains a 'please call to confirm' caveat and no hours are fabricated.
Menu prices follow sealed evidence (some verified, some estimated per Phase 3 copy advisories); no unverified price claims were added at launch.
Payment methods are unknown; no payment claims or paymentAccepted schema appear anywhere.

remainingHumanOwnedGates: Owner-run production deploy/confirmation: `netlify deploy --prod --dir=dist` (site b3578dcc-c6b6-4070-b049-55e35dfb1c09). Current live origin already matches this verified build.
Yahya launch-readiness approval of this sealed Phase 7 artifact.
